text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"And now for a special feature! It's time for
today's Twinkle Legends segment!"

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Allow us to introduce you to the Triple Crown
Champions, as well as the Umamusume who have
shone brightly in the Triple Tiara!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, figures. There's no special feature for
Umamusume who threw away glory to switch
tours.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Is there anyone who's ever gone from the Oka
Sho to the Derby and won?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So it's never been done before... Oh, man. This is
gettin' my blood pumpin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that must mean it's super difficult, right?
Changin' tours will give me completely different
opponents, too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The racers who went to the Satsuki Sho already
know who they're up against, so racing 'em for the
first time at the Derby itself is nuts.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't regret runnin' in the Oka Sho... but that
detour sure came at a price.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other racers picked their tracks with a goal in
mind. I doubt either side will take kindly to
Vodka switching from the Tiara to the Crown.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can't see a way out... I've got no clue what to do.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How do I even start thinkin' about this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: How about asking some older students?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Like ones that've run in the Derby before?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I know exactly who to talk to! Someone
who's an even bigger renegade than me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You wanna go from the Oka Sho to the Japanese
Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I want your opinion, seeing as you've
had so many famous exploits yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're really planning on going for it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Please... Give me some advice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I've got nothing to say.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?! C'mon, please!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Stop asking me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just tell me about the Derby, then! It's my dream
race, so at least tell me what it's like to run there!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I have to hear it from you, Brian! I have to know how it looked from your perspective.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...The Japanese Derby is a special place. It's not
for people who're just following in their role
model's footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's for the people ready to tear their own
inspiration down from the throne.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: To tear... their own inspiration down?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If your soul is burning for the Derby, you go. If
not, don't bother. There's no choice to make.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I think you might be like me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Really? How so?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You don't see a point in trying to map out the
future. Riding some preset logic-based rail isn't
gonna give you the satisfaction you want.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're starved for something bigger than winning
or losing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So go where your gut takes you. You've come too
far to turn tail trying to act normal now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't have any advice for you. We're
done here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Vodka tells me about her
conversation with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: In the end, it's my decision. Our decision.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So what do ya think? If it were you, how would
you look at it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The first thing Vodka needs to consider is...
choice_data_list: What exactly does being cool mean to you?
What exactly does being cool mean to you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Cool is what I've been after this whole time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No wavering, no giving in, and no looking back...
That's my definition of cool.
choice_data_list: So what's the cool thing to do?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The cool thing to do...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's right... I should do whatever I think is
coolest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka thinks for a long time. She looks like she's
scowling at herself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I think the cool thing to do is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Tackling the thing I've been dreaming of ever
since I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Even if it goes against the norm, and even if
everyone else thinks it's reckless...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's not about who my opponents are or what they
think. It's about me, and myself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta live by my own guidelines, no matter
what anyone else thinks of me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Inspirations aren't people to chase—they're
people to overcome.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's what being cool means to me. Which
means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The long night is finally over.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, will ya stick with me through this?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Everyone might laugh at us. We might get
crushed. But even so...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be true to myself and be cool! So...
we're goin' to the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's right! This is my path!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do exactly what I want! I'm goin' from
the Oka Sho to the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter what anyone else says! I'm doin' my career my style!
